ogTitle: Old Noarlunga vs Old Reynella: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Old Noarlunga and Old Reynella.
heading: Old Noarlunga vs Old Reynella — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Old Noarlunga, South Australia and Old Reynella, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Old Noarlunga has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Old Reynella (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Old Noarlunga or Old Reynella safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Old Noarlunga has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Old Reynella scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Old Noarlunga scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Old Reynella scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Old Noarlunga or Old Reynella?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Old Noarlunga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
